info:
This software is still in the testing phase and does not represent the final quality.
 The current version does not have networking capabilities. To get the latest version, please join the QQ group: 1062670402.
 Official website: nikki.ranaxro.com
 GitHub: github.com/RanAxro/nikki_albums
name: Name
livePhotoExportFormat_description: When exporting from the Video album, automatically convert cover image and video into the corresponding platform's live photo format
deleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete this account
gameAlreadyExists: It already exists, duplicate addition is discouraged. If you really need to add it, please click Save again
MallPicDescription: Images downloaded for the in-game Mall.
deleteXTag: Are you sure you want to delete the tag : {}
deleteSameImage: Delete the same pictures in the following albums
left-clickToSelectImage: Left-click here to select an image
dragImageHere: Drag and drop the image here
right-clickToPasteImage: Right-click here to paste image from clipboard
useSameNetworkDevice: Please use a device on the same network to download
savePathIsNull: Please select the file saving location
deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete these pictures? Once deleted, they cannot be recovered. Please make your choice carefully!
clearRecycleBinMessage: Are you sure you want to empty the Recycle Bin? Once deleted, it cannot be recovered. Please make your choice carefully!
find no uid: Please select a uid to view this album
OpenFromFileExplorer: Open the album from File Explorer
toSelectLayoutMethod: Select the layout method of the album
toSelectClassificationMethod: Select the classification method of the album
toSelectSortMethod: Select the sort method of the album
ai_ClockInPhotoDescription: Your expeditions, please back them up promptly!
ai_CloudPhotos_LowQualityDescription: Low-res cache from Cloud Photos. Safe to delete.
ai_CloudPhotosDescription: Low-res cache from Cloud Photos. Safe to delete.
ai_CustomAvatarDescription: Previously used avatars. The game never cleans this folder—tidy it up yourself.
ai_CustomCardDescription: Previously used name-cards. The game never cleans this folder—tidy it up yourself.
ai_CustomHomeBoardPhotoDescription: Cover image for your Home signpost.
ai_DIYDescription: Last-edited image in the Color Lookbook. Only the most recent version is kept.
ai_HomeTemplatePhotoDescription: Cover image for your Home template.
ai_MagazinePhotosDescription: Your scrapbook, please back them up promptly!
ai_NikkiPhotos_HighQualityDescription: High-res shots from Momo’s camera with full metadata. Back them up and clean them out regularly!
ai_ScreenShotDescription: Every photo you take lands here. The game doesn’t manage this album.
